title: Fix supabase config.toml project_id to production
description: supabase/config.toml line 1 has project_id = pgrrbkhxukxvzzauviyp (old Lovable project). Must be changed to vwezujtftfccamoduglp. This affects all Supabase CLI operations run without --project-ref flag.
acceptance_criteria: config.toml project_id equals vwezujtftfccamoduglp; supabase functions list works without --project-ref
notes: Changed project_id from pgrrbkhxukxvzzauviyp to vwezujtftfccamoduglp in supabase/config.toml

title: Add UX copy explaining admin sync vs cached data
description: Admin panel is confusing - users think they must sync every time. Add helper text/tooltips explaining that data is cached in DB and sync refreshes from external APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Admin panel has clear explanation of sync workflow
notes: Added Info icon tooltip to SportsDataManagement explaining that data is cached and sync pulls from external APIs

title: Fix error message referencing Lovable Cloud secrets
description: sync-odds-snapshot error message referenced Lovable Cloud. Should reference Supabase project secrets.
acceptance_criteria: Error message says Supabase project secrets; no Lovable references in edge functions
notes: Changed error message to reference Supabase project secrets instead of Lovable Cloud secrets

title: Switch NFL player sync to /players/active endpoint
description: BDL /players returns all historical players including retired (Tom Brady). Switch to /players/active endpoint (available on GOAT tier) to only sync currently active roster players.
acceptance_criteria: After resync, only active players in DB; retired players like Tom Brady not in rankings
notes: Changed endpoint from /players to /players/active in sync-nfl-players edge function. This will exclude retired players like Tom Brady on next sync.

title: Fix DataInspector position summary showing wrong position
description: DataInspector.tsx line 387 shows positionData[0].position (most common in DB) instead of the queried player's position. Shows 'Cornerback' when querying Josh Allen (QB).
acceptance_criteria: Position summary shows Josh Allen's actual position OR label clarified to 'Most common position'
notes: Fixed label from 'Position format' to 'Most common position in DB' with count, clarifying this is database-wide stats not the queried player's position

title: Investigate partial NFL season data from BDL
description: Josh Allen shows 2-3 games for 2020-2024 but 17 for 2021. Need to check raw_data column to see if BDL returned complete data. If BDL data is incomplete, contact support (GOAT tier should have full data per docs).
acceptance_criteria: Root cause identified; either transform bug fixed OR BDL support ticket opened
notes: ROOT CAUSE: BDL returns regular season AND postseason stats separately via postseason param. We were mixing them. FIX: Now sync BOTH - regular season (postseason=false) stored as season_type='regular', playoff stats (postseason=true) stored as season_type='postseason'. Josh Allen will now show 17 regular season games + 2-3 playoff games per year.

title: Remove lovable-tagger dev dependency and vite plugin
description: Remove lovable-tagger from package.json and vite.config.ts.
acceptance_criteria: lovable-tagger removed from package.json; vite.config.ts has no lovable imports; npm run build succeeds
notes: Removed lovable-tagger from package.json and vite.config.ts. 27 packages removed. Build succeeds.

title: Replace Lovable template README with MGP Analytics docs
description: README.md is the default Lovable boilerplate. Replace with actual MGP Analytics project documentation.
acceptance_criteria: README has no Lovable references; documents actual project setup and deployment
notes: Replaced Lovable boilerplate README with real MGP Analytics docs
